---
title: Lille théâtre
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810450/20250520_085615_mtem8e.jpg
description: Théâtre du Nord, Lille
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2025/05/06
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779810450/20250520_085615_mtem8e.jpg)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
